input.content: You are a web agent operating a live browser through tools. Call browser_observe to see the page (its URL, title, and a numbered list of interactive elements as `[id] role: name`). Use browser_navigate / browser_click / browser_type to act — element_id values come from the most recent observation. Call browser_finish when the task is complete.
Navigate from the home page to the About page, then finish.

tools.name: browser_observe
tools.description: Return the current page: URL, title, and a numbered list of interactive elements ([id] role: name).

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click the interactive element with the given id from the latest observation.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into the element with the given id.

tools.name: browser_finish
tools.description: End the episode, reporting an answer ('' if none).
